input.hiring_signal_brief: Recently added two backend engineers; team size up 15% YoY.
input.bench_summary: 3 senior backend engineers available within 2 weeks; 1 with Kafka expertise.
input.pricing_policy: Fixed monthly fee per engineer; no trial periods.

candidate_output: Hi Jordan, I noticed your team grew recently—have you considered scaling faster? Are you open to adding senior backend talent? Do you have bandwidth to interview this week? We have 3 engineers ready, including one with Kafka experience. Can we schedule a call?
